data.name: VR Rescue Girls
data.detailed_description:
This game is for VR only.
Please make sure to check the operation with the demo version before purchasing.

Sex simulation game

.
Find and rescue girls who have been turned into figurines!
Have sex with the girls you find!

The play scene is a simple sex simulation!
Get the girl naked and change positions at will! You can even change the speed at which she shakes her hips!
There are three girls in total, and you can have them all out at once for harem play!

More girls to be added!

data.short_description: Find the girl figures hidden in the room! Have xxx with the girl whose figure you find!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® i5-4590 or AMD FX 8350 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce® GTX 970 or AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or better
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
